GAD-alum immunotherapy trials continue (intra-lymphatic approach in 14 LADA patients ongoing). 3-year follow-up study on HLA-DR3DQ2 carriers estimated completion March 2025. Tier remains SILVER — gap is real but therapeutic approach is speculative.

3.audit_notes: 2026-03-30 audit: Insulin Resistance in Islet Transplant. 12th CITR Allograft Report (2025) covers 1,477 recipients across 40 centers. Insulin independence 40-60% at 1yr, ~25% at 5yr. Tegoprubart (anti-CD40L) trial at UChicago: all 10 patients >4wks post-transplant achieved insulin independence with mean HbA1c ~5.35%, avoiding calcineurin inhibitor toxicity. Sana Biotechnology HIP-modified stem-cell islets (SC451) IND expected 2026. GOLD tier confirmed. | 2026-04-10 audit: Tegoprubart data updated March 2026 — 10/12 patients insulin independent, mean HbA1c ~5.35%, no rejection episodes, no nephrotoxicity. CNI-free regimen. Breakthrough T1D funding second study for tegoprubart in T1D+CKD. This strengthens Gap 4 (Drug Repurposing for Islet Transplant) more than Gap 3 directly. GOLD maintained.

4.audit_notes: 2026-03-30 audit: Drug Repurposing for Islet Transplant. Tegoprubart represents novel immunosuppression but is NOT a repurposed generic. Eledon Pharmaceuticals March 2026 update shows strong efficacy. No new generic drug repurposing studies found specifically for islet transplant immunosuppression. Published AJT 2025. Breakthrough T1D funding second study. This is exactly the drug repurposing this gap describes. Consider GOLD promotion — now has clinical data from a prospective trial.

Narrative review April 2025 explores CAR-Treg approaches. However, specific Treg-neuropathy intersection remains sparse — most Treg research focuses on T1D autoimmunity or nephropathy, not neuropathy directly. Gap remains valid. But NO direct clinical evidence linking Treg therapy to diabetic neuropathy nerve repair. Signal Transduction 2025 review covers DN pathogenesis (hyperglycemia, oxidative stress, mitochondrial dysfunction) but does not mention Treg-based approaches. Gap remains SILVER — Treg dysfunction confirmed in T1D but connection to neuropathy is indirect.

verapamil -> T1D.description: Verapamil preserves beta-cell function in new-onset T1D
verapamil -> T1D.evidence_summary: Ver-A-T1D European RCT (136 pts, 21 sites, 6 countries) presented EASD Sep 2025. Trend toward beta-cell preservation but underpowered: placebo C-peptide decline only 0.09 nmol/L/min, less than anticipated. Pediatric RCT (PMID:36826844, n=88) showed 30% higher C-peptide at 52 weeks. Adult RCT (PMID:29988125) showed improved C-peptide AUC at 3 and 12 months. Ver-A-Long extension ongoing. Mechanism confirmed: TXNIP inhibition protects beta cells.
verapamil -> T1D.rating_rationale: Strong pediatric data + positive adult trend, but pivotal European trial underpowered. PARTIALLY_VALIDATED pending Ver-A-Long 24-month data.
verapamil -> T1D.validation_notes: Strong pediatric data, European RCT (Ver-A-T1D) underpowered at EASD 2025. Ver-A-Long extension ongoing. Fixed from Run 22.

verapamil -> beta_cell.evidence_summary: Multiple RCTs confirm verapamil preserves C-peptide secretion (beta-cell function marker) in T1D. Mechanism: blocks TXNIP upregulation, reduces beta-cell apoptosis. Consistent adult and pediatric data.

dapagliflozin -> inflammation.description: Dapagliflozin reduces inflammation via NLRP3 inhibition in T2D
dapagliflozin -> inflammation.evidence_summary: Multiple independent sources confirm mechanism. Cardiovasc Diabetology 2024: dapagliflozin reduces systemic inflammation (hsCRP, IL-6) in T2D without HF. Frontiers Cardiovasc Med 2021: dapagliflozin limits NLRP3 inflammasome activation via AMPK/mTOR in myocardial I/R models. Ann Transl Med: dapagliflozin attenuates ROS-NLRP3 axis in steatohepatitis with DM. Mechanism: SGLT2i increases circulating ketones -> ketones inhibit NLRP3 inflammasome -> reduced IL-1B/IL-18.
dapagliflozin -> inflammation.rating_rationale: Convergent preclinical and clinical evidence from multiple independent groups. VALIDATED.
dapagliflozin -> inflammation.validation_notes: Convergent NLRP3 mechanism from multiple groups. DAPAN-DIA RCT (NCT06047262) actively recruiting. Fixed from Run 22.

metformin -> T2D.evidence_summary: Extensively validated. 2025 systematic review/meta-analysis of RCTs: metformin + lifestyle reduces T2D incidence by 52% in prediabetes. Mechanisms: reduces hepatic glucose synthesis, improves insulin sensitivity, anti-inflammatory effects, gut microbiota modulation. UKPDS (PMID 9742976) showed microvascular benefit.

NLRP3_inflammasome -> inflammation.description: NLRP3 inflammasome is a validated therapeutic target in diabetic inflammation
NLRP3_inflammasome -> inflammation.evidence_summary: DAPAN-DIA (NCT06047262): first large RCT of oral NLRP3 inhibitor (dapansutrile 1000mg BID) in T2D, 300 patients, primary endpoint HbA1c change. Active-recruiting as of Feb 2026. Multiple reviews (J Clin Med 2024, Front Immunol 2023) confirm NLRP3 role in T2D macrovascular complications. MCC950 development halted (hepatotoxicity), but dapansutrile has clean safety in 6 trials. NLRP3 -> caspase-1 -> IL-1B/IL-18 pathway well-established in diabetic nephropathy, retinopathy, CVD.
NLRP3_inflammasome -> inflammation.rating_rationale: Robust mechanistic evidence + first dedicated RCT recruiting. VALIDATED as therapeutic target.
NLRP3_inflammasome -> inflammation.validation_notes: DAPAN-DIA RCT recruiting, robust mechanistic evidence across multiple studies. Fixed from Run 22.

NF_kB -> inflammation.evidence_summary: Well-established pathway. NF-kB is upstream activator of NLRP3 transcription. Multiple reviews confirm NF-kB-driven inflammation in diabetic complications. SGLT2i suppress NF-kB activation.

empagliflozin -> inflammation.evidence_summary: UPGRADED from PARTIALLY_VALIDATED. New Feb 2026 study (PMID 41680826, Cardiovasc Diabetol) demonstrates empagliflozin attenuates both priming and activation of NLRP3 inflammasome in T2DM/AMI patients via reduced Cx43 hemichannel activity and ATP release. Earlier Nature Comms paper (PMID 32332754) showed ketone/insulin-mediated NLRP3 inhibition. Additional evidence: empagliflozin promotes NLRP3 degradation via ubiquitin-proteasome system (TRIM59/USP7 pathway). Three independent mechanisms now confirmed: (1) Cx43-ATP pathway, (2) BHB/insulin pathway, (3) ubiquitin-proteasome degradation.

dapagliflozin -> T2D.evidence_summary: FDA-approved for T2D. Extensive Phase 3 data. ADA/EASD 2026 Standards of Care include as first-line option for T2D with CKD or CVD risk. Mechanisms: SGLT2 inhibition, glycosuria, cardiovascular/renal protection.

search_findings.findings: Searched for recent oxidative stress + diabetes combination therapy evidence (2025-2026). Key findings: (1) Multi-target natural agents (polyphenols, terpenoids, alkaloids) show synergy via Nrf2 activation + NF-kB inhibition + inflammasome suppression. (2) Dual GSH + Vitamin D3 supplementation emerging as anti-inflammatory+antioxidant approach. (3) Nanoparticle delivery systems being explored to overcome bioavailability barriers. (4) NO large-scale RCTs yet for combination antioxidant+anti-inflammatory therapy in diabetes - still mostly preclinical/small studies. Assessment: Gap remains valid. Oxidative stress combination therapy is an active research area but lacks clinical-grade evidence. Relates to Gap 12 (Generic Drug x Diabetes Mechanism Catalog) and combination_validation.json. No tier promotion warranted yet. Recommend checking again in 3 months.

search_results.findings: ATTD 2026 (March): 12 adults with T1D, median 33yr duration. All 10 pts >4wk post-transplant achieved insulin independence AND HbA1c <6.0% (mean 5.35%). Calcineurin inhibitor-free regimen. No rejection, no de novo DSA, no nephrotoxicity. Anti-CD40L approach.
search_results.impact: HIGH - validates calcineurin-free immunosuppression path. May strengthen islet transplant research paths.

search_results.findings: Landmark: 25yo woman with T1D achieved insulin independence at 75 days post-autologous CiPSC-islet transplant, sustained >12mo. TIR 43%->96%. HbA1c ~5%. 7/10 participants insulin-independent at 180d. Also T2D case achieved independence. CiPSCs from adipose MSCs.
search_results.impact: VERY HIGH - paradigm shift toward autologous cell therapy. Eliminates immunosuppression need if confirmed at scale.

search_results.findings: Ver-A-T1D parent trial: 12mo results at EASD 2025 showed NO statistically significant difference in C-peptide (verapamil vs placebo), though trend favored treatment. Safe (AV block 22%, bradycardia 16%, mild/reversible). Ver-A-Long extension study (3yr follow-up) not yet reported.
search_results.impact: MODERATE-LOW - verapamil monotherapy may not preserve beta cells. Updates needed when Ver-A-Long reports.

search_results.findings: POLARIS Phase 1 trial: first patient dosed March 18, 2026. NCT06919354. Adults 18-45yr within 120d of T1D diagnosis. Single-dose autologous EngTreg. 78-week follow-up. Results expected late 2026/early 2027. Preclinical: GNTI-122 suppressed islet-specific effector T cells, trafficked to pancreas, prevented diabetes in mouse model.
search_results.impact: HIGH - First engineered Treg cell therapy for T1D entering clinical testing. Validates Gap 13 (Treg/CAR-T) relevance.

search_results.findings: Multiple 2024-2025 systematic reviews confirm NLRP3 as central mediator. Dapansutrile in Phase 2/3 (safe in 6 trials). MCC950 terminated (hepatotoxicity). No diabetes-specific NLRP3 inhibitor trial yet.
search_results.impact: HIGH - validates top research path. Therapeutic gap remains.

queries: GNTI-122 POLARIS Phase 1 type 1 diabetes Treg 2026

findings.GNTI-122: First patient dosed March 18, 2026 in POLARIS Phase 1. No efficacy data yet. Results expected late 2026/early 2027. NCT06919354.
findings.DAPAN-DIA: Phase 2 ongoing (300 pts, 2:1, dapansutrile 1000mg BID vs placebo, 6mo). HbA1c primary endpoint. Multicenter EU trial. No interim results published. Also expanding to Parkinson's Phase 2.
findings.dorzagliatin: No US FDA approval as of March 2026. Approved China (2022), Japan. New publication PMID 40896829 on alpha/beta cell function effects. Phase 1b US data presented ADA 2025.

pubmed_searches.query: dapansutrile OLT1177 NLRP3 diabetes clinical trial 2025 2026
findings: DAPAN-DIA Phase 2 trial: First patient enrolled in Basel, Switzerland (PI: Marc Donath)
~300 patients with T2D + complications, 6-month treatment vs placebo
Assessing cardiometabolic risk factors + weight lowering with GLP-1 combo
Dapansutrile expanding: Phase 2/3 gout, Phase 2 melanoma, Phase 2 T2D, Phase 2 Parkinson's
New paper: dapansutrile regulates mitochondrial oxidative stress, reduces hepatic lipid accumulation in diabetic mice
pubmed_searches.impact: DAPAN-DIA trial actively recruiting. Strengthens NLRP3->diabetes path. No new PMIDs identified yet.

pubmed_searches.query: autologous CiPSC iPSC islet transplant diabetes replication 2025 2026
findings: Wang et al. CiPSC islet transplant: 1-year outcomes published - sustained insulin independence from day 75
2 additional patients enrolled in trial ChiCTR2300072200, results expected 2025
CAVEAT: Patient was on immunosuppression from prior organ transplant - confounds autoimmunity question
Multiple reviews (PMC, JDI 2025, Frontiers 2025) covering iPSC/ESC islet transplant landscape
No independent group replication yet - still single-center (Wang/Deng group)
pubmed_searches.impact: No independent replication of CiPSC result yet. Additional patients from same group still pending. Important caveat about immunosuppression remains.

GNTI-122_POLARIS.details: Phase 1 (NCT06919354). Adults 18-45 within 120 days of T1D diagnosis. Dose escalation. 78-week follow-up. FDA Fast Track.

dorzagliatin_US.status: ACTIVE - Phase 1b under IND-159103 completed 6-week monotherapy study. Results published at ADA 2025.
dorzagliatin_US.notes: 6 T2D subjects, 75mg BID dorzagliatin. Showed increased hepatic UDP-glucose flux via direct pathway. Also showed 1.3-fold increase in beta-cell glucose sensitivity in IGT subjects. Not yet FDA approved in US.

DAPAN-DIA_dapansutrile.details: Phase 2 (NCT06047262). Dapansutrile 1000mg BID vs placebo, 26 weeks. HbA1c>7.5%, hsCRP>1.5mg/L. Completion ~2026.

2026-03-30.BARICADE: BARICADE-DELAY and BARICADE-PRESERVE Phase 3 trials launched late 2025/early 2026 by Eli Lilly. Testing baricitinib (JAK inhibitor) in stage 2 and stage 3 T1D, ages 1-36. No results yet.
2026-03-30.REC1TE: Phase 2b trial (n=102) of colchicine 0.5mg/day in T1D with hsCRP≥2mg/L. Last patient last visit expected Feb 2026 — trial may be completing now. No published results yet. PMID 41047989 is design paper.
2026-03-30.GNTI_122_POLARIS: Phase 1 open-label study of GNTI-122 (autologous engineered Treg cell therapy) in recently diagnosed T1D. First participant dosed ~March 2026. FDA Fast Track designation granted. Results expected late 2026/early 2027.
2026-03-30.DAPAN_DIA: Phase 2 multicenter trial of dapansutrile (NLRP3 inhibitor) 1000mg BID in T2D (n=300). Still enrolling in Switzerland, France, Belgium, Germany. 6-month treatment duration; results not expected until late 2026.
2026-03-30.Ver_A_T1D: Multicentre RCT (n=120) of verapamil 360mg/day for beta-cell preservation in newly diagnosed adult T1D. Protocol published (PMID 39613428). Recruiting.
2026-03-30.Tegoprubart_Islet: Eledon Pharmaceuticals March 2026 update: 10/10 evaluable islet transplant recipients achieved insulin independence with mean HbA1c ~5.35%. Anti-CD40L approach avoids calcineurin inhibitor toxicity.
